item.title: An "illness" is spreading through the Trucker Convoy.
item.description: Tried to remove ads where possible. And before you say it, no, I'm not happy that people are getting ill. I just find the irony of it all funny. Plus, "Talladega Nights" is hilarious. Sauce: https://www.vice.com/en/article/4aw8gw/dc-trucker-convoy-ricky-bobby?utm_source=email&utm_medium=editorial&utm_c

item.dc:creator: Roastie

item.title: This was banned on the art website Artstation
item.description:
Artstation deliberately bans all pro Ukraine artworks and hereby supports the russian warmongers and atrocities. They refuse all discussion about the subject and pretend nothing is happening. Art should not be censored, and certainly not this. There are dozens of artworks that have since been removed or where commenting is no longer possible. (Not my artwork but trying to spread the word.)
https://www.instagram.com/p/CbQJ-lNKx97/
item.dc:creator: Divisionby9

item.title: Day 302: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: The Ron Burgundy Angus Beef Patty, Applewood Smoked Bacon, Fried Egg, Two Slices Of American Cheese, Cilantro, Guacamole, Sliced Tomato And Garlic Mayonnaise, Donut Buns From Gourdough's In Austin, Texas Previous Day 301: https://imgur.com/gallery/kyLNmxy MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: Слава Україні/Glory to Ukraine
item.description: For the sake of this long-awaited embrace, hundreds of thousands of our fearless Ukrainian soldiers are working with all their might every second to bring our Victory closer! And very soon the Victory will be for us!

item.dc:creator: LordOfTheFattys

item.title: Also, prisons should not be run by for-profit companies
item.description: Private prisons in the United States incarcerated 115,428 people in 2019, representing 8% of the total state and federal prison population. Since 2000, the number of people housed in private prisons has increased 32% compared to an overall rise in the prison population of 3%. Sauce: https://www.sentencingproject.org/publications/private-prisons-united-states/#:~:text=Data%20compiled%20by%20the%20Bureau,America)%2C%20LaSalle%20Corrections%2C%20and
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: Danuta is fantastic
item.description: On April 13, 1985, while the Swedish Nordic Realm Party was having a demonstration in Vaxjo, Sweden, Danuta Danielsson intervened, swinging her purse at one of the members. She was a Polish immigrant whose mother had survived a concentration camp during WWII. Accomplished artist Susanna Arwin created a bronze statue commemorating the moment in 2014.
item.dc:creator: huntsnhava40
